\title{Native Simple PDF Fixture}
\author{Strata Reader Project}

\begin{document}
\maketitle
\section{Introduction}
This is a native simple PDF file used to verify the baseline text extraction of the Strata-Reader engine.
It contains standard characters, a single column layout, and basic section headings.

\subsection{Basic Features}
The extraction should retrieve this text with high fidelity, preserving word groupings and basic reading order from top to bottom.
\end{document}
